sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n41777" key="e)/poiktos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἔποικτ-ος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">=</abbr> <sense id="n41777.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">piteous,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">φόνυς</foreign> ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0085.tlg005.perseus-grc1:1614" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1614</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
